overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character disguised in a grass cloak walking through ancient stone ruins under a vast starry underground sky. The character moves steadily toward a massive distant archway surrounded by crumbling pillars, stone planters, and glowing braziers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone doorway opening to starlit ruins

events.description: character exits dark stone doorway into open starlit ruins area
ambient light increases as character moves fully into the open starry area

agents.ego_description: walking forward out of a dark stone doorway into the open ruins, wearing a grass-like camouflage cloak

entered.detail: massive dark stone doorway frame that the character is exiting through
vivid blue and purple star-filled sky with nebula clouds visible beyond the doorway
tall dark stone archway structure standing in the distance
stone pedestal with bright orange flame burning to the left of the path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from a massive dark stone doorway into an open ancient ruin bathed in ethereal starlight. A large stone archway stands silhouetted against the vivid starry sky ahead, while a flaming brazier provides warm light to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ruined plaza with scattered stone monuments

events.description: distant glowing golden temple structure becomes visible on the right horizon
camera pans slightly right revealing more of the glowing distant structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the ruins, surveying the ancient stone structures and distant glowing building

entered.detail: distant building with warm golden glowing windows floating in the starry void
large circular stone planter or fountain basin beside the path
tall thin stone columns rising into the starry sky on the left

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the ruins, the character passes large stone planters while a distant glowing temple structure becomes prominent on the right. The starry sky dominates overhead as the character advances toward the central archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined stone pathway lined with broken columns and planters

events.description: character weaves slightly left then right while navigating around rubble
passing between two large stone planters flanking the path

agents.ego_description: navigating the uneven stone path, weaving slightly between rubble and stone structures while approaching the central arch

entered.detail: another lit stone brazier with orange flame on the right side
scattered collapsed stone blocks and debris

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the ruins, passing between large stone planters and navigating around rubble. The central archway grows larger ahead while the glowing temple on the right moves out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to massive stone archway with red glowing lights

events.description: red glowing lights at the base of the archway become visible
character slows slightly as approaching the archway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the large stone archway, approaching the red-lit entrance at the end of the path

entered.detail: pair of red luminous lights flanking the base of the archway entrance

segments.scene_description: In the final approach to the massive stone archway, red glowing lights become visible at its base. The character walks steadily toward the dark entrance as the archway fills the view ahead, framing the starry sky beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the threshold of a dark stone doorway into the heart of an expansive, starlit ancient ruin. It begins as the character emerges into the open air, where a flaming brazier casts a warm glow against the silhouette of a massive distant archway under a vivid starry sky. As the character advances deeper into the ruins, the camera passes large stone planters and a glowing temple structure on the right, which gradually recedes from view as the central archway becomes more prominent. The scene then shifts through a landscape of rubble and stone pillars, with the scale of the architecture growing more imposing. Finally, the camera closes in on the massive archway, revealing red glowing lights at its base as the character walks toward the dark entrance that frames the celestial sky beyond.
